Lyrics in Thanglish

poli vazhka thaan vaazhurom

Thakka thaiyya thakka thaiyya thakka thaiyya

appa appa adha kathuthara marandhutu

TV petti munna nidham kidakurom
adhil thembi azhum penna kandu urugurom
paaka vandha sondhagalai kaaka vachi

Thaalaatu paatellaam kaanaama pocheda

pacha kulandhaiyum thoongudhu

serum podhu nimmadhi porakkumey

Anna thambi sanda kooda nadakaalaam
adhil aalukoru pallu kooda udayalaam

kaiyya vacha thambi manam thudikumey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thaka Thayya?

The song Thaka Thayya conveys a fun and lively atmosphere, celebrating youthful exuberance and social interactions.

What is the plot context of the movie Alex Pandian?

Alex Pandian revolves around action and comedy, featuring a protagonist who navigates through various challenges while maintaining a light-hearted spirit.

Who is the singer of Thaka Thayya?

The song is sung by the talented Karthik, known for his energetic and versatile singing style.

Who composed the music for Alex Pandian?

The music for Alex Pandian was composed by the renowned Devi Sri Prasad, who is celebrated for his catchy and vibrant compositions.

When was Thaka Thayya released?

Thaka Thayya was released on December 13, 2012, as part of the movie Alex Pandian.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thaka Thayya, the lively beats and catchy lyrics reflect the carefree spirit of youth, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The song captures the essence of social interactions and the joy of living in the moment, resonating with audiences looking for a fun escape. Set against the backdrop of Alex Pandian, it enhances the film's energetic narrative. With Karthik's engaging vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's vibrant composition, this track evokes feelings of happiness and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaka Thayya from Alex Pandian is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, perfectly encapsulating the energetic vibes of the film. With Karthik's dynamic vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's catchy composition, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the fun and excitement that this song brings, making it a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Hey uncle, the girl is just a rumor for a while. Now in marriage, we are just casually searching for a girl.
Our neighbor's name is not known, we search for friends on Facebook.
Hey girls, what happened to your brother? We talk about all this.
Everyone has a cellphone in hand, with movie songs as ringtones, forgetting to talk and living a fake life.
Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, without these relationships, the world is a waste. Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, every relationship should bring happiness.
Hey, we forget our father's name and live by the names of Sachin and Dhoni.
Hey dad, we forget that and then we end up in trouble.
Before the TV box, we sit quietly, seeing a girl cry makes us melt. We take the words that come and turn them into love.
Without seeing the dance, we just listen to the song, now even the little kids are sleeping.
Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, without these relationships, the world is a waste. Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, every relationship should bring happiness.
Hey, if money comes, it won't be useful. To marry a girl, we need some connection. Even if we roam around, when we come home, peace will come.
Brother and younger brother can fight, but they can also have a bond. If someone comes and touches the elder brother, the younger brother's heart will ache.
Even if we say 'caw caw', the crow will gather. A human being is the one who sings half-heartedly.
Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, without these relationships, the world is a waste. Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, Thakka Thaiyya, every relationship should bring happiness.
